headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' cdn.jsdelivr.net cdnjs.cloudflare.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: ui-avatars.com; frame-src 'self'; frame-ancestors 'self'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; upgrade-insecure-requests
